blocks.text: YOU  CAN'T POSSIBLY  DEFEAT ME  BY  MERELY  MIMICKING THE  HEAVENLY  DEMON DIVINE  ART .
blocks.translation: TU NE PEUX PAS ME VAINCRE EN IMITANT SIMPLEMENT L’ART DIVIN DU DÉMON CÉLESTE.
IL N’Y A QU’UNE SEULE ISSUE.

blocks.text: I  WILL  MANIFEST THE  HEAVENLY  DEMON DIVINE  ART .
blocks.translation: JE VAIS MANIFESTER L’ART DIVIN DU DÉMON CÉLESTE.

blocks.text: YOU'VE COMPLETELY  EXCEEDED MY  EXPECTATIONS ONCE  AGAIN !
blocks.translation: TU DÉPASSES À NOUVEAU TOUTES MES ATTENTES !

blocks.text: THE  OTHER SECRET  TECHNIQUE THAT  MAKES  UP  THE HEAVENLY  DEMON DIVINE  ART .
blocks.translation: L’AUTRE TECHNIQUE SECRÈTE QUI CONSTITUE L’ART DIVIN DU DÉMON CÉLESTE.

blocks.text: RIGHT  AT THIS  MOMENT ,  IN  ALL MY  SENSES ,
blocks.translation: À L’INSTANT PRÉCIS, DANS TOUS MES SENS,
LA FIN QUE TU DÉSIRAIS TANT...

blocks.text: I  SHALL GIFT  IT  TO YOU .
THE  HEAVENLY DEMON  DIVINE  ART  HAS BEEN  REBORN !
blocks.translation: L’ART DIVIN DU DÉMON CÉLESTE EST RENAÎTRE !

blocks.text: THE  NURTURER  OF A  GREAT  AND  SUPREME CIVILIZATION ... !
blocks.translation: LE NURRICIER D’UNE GRANDE ET SUPRÊME CIVILISATION... !

blocks.text: ADAPTATION  |  NYEONG - NI DIRECTION  |  MONKERSHIN DIRECTION  JUNG  JAEYU ORIGINAL  CORAL  REEF ART  |  STUDIO
blocks.translation: ADAPTATION | DIRECTION NYEONG-NI | DIRECTION MONKERSHIN | JUNG JAEYU ORIGINAL CORAIL RÉCIF ART | STUDIO

blocks.text: ... THE AFTERLIFE  BUILT BY  THE  OLD FATHER .
blocks.translation: ... L’AU-DELÀ CONSTRUIT PAR LE VIEUX PÈRE.

blocks.text: IT'S  MUCH MORE  GRAPHIC  THAN THE  GAME ... !
blocks.translation: C’EST BIEN PLUS CHOC QUE LE JEU... !

blocks.text: AN  EMPTY SPACE  WITH  NOTHING BUT  GRAY  SOIL .
blocks.translation: UN ESPACE VIDE AVEC RIEN QUE DU SOL GRIS.

blocks.text: I  KNOW  WHERE THIS  PLACE  IS .
A  FUSION OF  AN  OUTER  GOD DESCENDED  FROM AN  OTHERWORLD ,
blocks.translation: UNE FUSION D’UN DIEU EXTÉRIEUR DESCENDU D’UN AUTRE MONDE,

blocks.text: AND  A  NATIVE  GOD BORN  ON  EARTH ...
blocks.translation: ET D’UNE DIVINITÉ NATIVE NÉE SUR TERRE...

blocks.text: MY  VESSEL THE  SAVIOR  OF THE  WORLD .
blocks.translation: MON VÉHICULE, LE SAUVEUR DU MONDE.

blocks.text: THE  ONE WHO  WILL  BECOME THE  LIGHT  OF  THE  VOID DIMENSION .
blocks.translation: CELUI QUI DEVIENDRA LA LUMIÈRE DE LA DIMENSION DU VIDE.

blocks.text: YOU GO  IF  YOU  WERE ME ,  YOU  MUTT BASTARD ?!
blocks.translation: À MA PLACE, ESPÈCE DE BASTARD DE CHIEN ?!

blocks.text: HOW  COULD YOU  NOT  KNOW  THAT THE  END  OF  DESTINY  IS APPROACHING .
blocks.translation: COMMENT NE PAS SAVOIR QUE LA FIN DU DESTIN APPROCHE.

blocks.text: VERY  WELL . OUT  OF  RESPECT  FOR YOUR  DIVINE  SEAT ,  I SHALL  DISMANTLE YOU  MYSELF .
blocks.translation: TRÈS BIEN. PAR RESPECT POUR TON TRÔNE DIVIN, JE TE DÉMANTÈLERAI MOI-MÊME.

blocks.text: IS  ALSO EXACTLY  THE  SAME AS  THE  GAME !
blocks.translation: C’EST EXACTEMENT COMME DANS LE JEU !

blocks.text: I  MUST  CHIP  AWAY THE  OLD  FATHER'S  HEALTH WITHIN  THE  TIME  LIMIT .
blocks.translation: JE DOIS ÉRODER LA SANTÉ DU VIEUX PÈRE AVANT LA FIN DU TEMPS IMPARTI.

blocks.text: TO  DO  THAT ,  I  WILL REALIZE  WHAT  I  HAVE  BEEN DREAMING  OF .
blocks.translation: POUR CELA, JE RÉALISERAI CE DONT J’AI TOUJOURS RÊVÉ.
TECHNIQUE DE MORT INSTANTANÉE, RUGISSEMENT ÉTOILÉ > !

blocks.text: HERE  IT  COMES ! THE  FIRST  ATTACK OF  PHASE  3 ...
blocks.translation: VOILÀ ! LA PREMIÈRE ATTAQUE DE LA PHASE 3...

blocks.text: JUST  AS  I THOUGHT ,  THE  PATTERNS ARE  EXACTLY  THE  SAME AS  IN  THE  GAME !
blocks.translation: COMME JE L’AVAIS PRÉVU, LES MOTIFS SONT EXACTEMENT LES MÊMES QUE DANS LE JEU !

blocks.text: BUT  I  STILL TOOK  THIS  MUCH DAMAGE ...
blocks.translation: MAIS J’AI TOUT DE MÊME SUBI AUTANT DE DOMMAGES...

blocks.text: THIS  TIRESOME BATTLE  IS  ALSO AT  ITS  END !
blocks.translation: CE COMBAT FATIGANT TOUCHE AUSSI À SA FIN !

blocks.text: A  TRIPLE FUSION  THAT  GOES  BEYOND THE  HETEROGENOUS  DUAL FUSION
blocks.translation: UNE FUSION TRIPLE QUI DÉPASSE LA FUSION DUALE HÉTÉROGÈNE
L’ÉPÉE LA PLUS PUISSANTE DE SEOUL ARCANE...

blocks.text: IF  I  STACK , STACK ,  AND  STACK SOME  MORE-
blocks.translation: SI JE CUMULE, CUMULE, ET CUMULE ENCORE-

blocks.text: I  CAN  EVEN TAKE  OUT  A  MONSTER GOD  LIKE  HIM  IN  ONE SHOT ... !
blocks.translation: JE PEUX MÊME ABATTRE UN DIEU MONSTRE COMME LUI D’UN COUP... !

blocks.text: I'LL  STACK ALL  THE  TRAITS I  HAVE .
blocks.translation: JE VAIS CUMULER TOUS LES TRAITS QUE J’AI.

blocks.text: I  HAVE  BURNED EVERYTHING  I  BUILT  UP OVER  THOUSANDS
blocks.translation: J’AI BRÛLÉ TOUT CE QUE J’AI CONSTRUIT PENDANT DES MILLIERS

blocks.text: DID  YOU THINK  A  MERE  HUMAN COULD  CATCH  UP  TO  THAT IMMEASURABLE KARMA ?
blocks.translation: PENSAIS-TU QU’UN SIMPLE HUMAIN POUVAIT RATTRAPER CE KARMA IMMENSÉMENT GRAND ?

blocks.text: NOW , OFFER  UP  YOUR  HEART YOURSELF .
I  SHALL PERSONALLY  GRANT YOU  THE  MERCY  OF  A PAINLESS  DEATH .
blocks.translation: JE T’OFFRIRAI PERSONNELLEMENT LA MISÉRICORDE D’UNE MORT SANS DOULEUR.

blocks.text: IF  YOU  REPEAT YOUR  MEANINGLESS DEFIANCE ,
blocks.translation: SI TU CONTINUES TES DÉFIS INUTILES,

blocks.text: AS  LONG AS  I  STILL  HAVE TRAITS !
blocks.translation: TANT QUE J’AI ENCORE DES TRAITS !
< ÉPÉE BRISANT LE CIEL DU DÉMON CÉLESTE >

blocks.text: HOW  DOES  IT FEEL  TO  BE  REBORN AS  THE  GOD  KING  OF THE  NEW  WORLD ?
blocks.translation: COMMENT CELA FAIT-IL DE REVENIR EN TANT QUE DIEU ROI DU NOUVEAU MONDE ?

blocks.text: YOUR  SOUL WILL  SUFFER  FOR ALL  ETERNITY .
JUST  WHERE THE  HELL  DID  IT  ALL GO  WRONG ...
blocks.translation: OÙ DIABLE TOUT A-T-IL MAL TOURNÉ...

blocks.text: I'M  ASKING BECAUSE  YOU  SEEM TO  BE  USING  IT  IN  A PECULIAR  WAY .
blocks.translation: JE DEMANDE PARCE QUE TU SEMBLES L’UTILISER D’UNE FAÇON PARTICULIÈRE.

blocks.text: ARE  YOU SAYING  THIS  ISN'T HOW  IT'S  SUPPOSED TO  BE  USED ?
blocks.translation: TU DIS QUE CE N’EST PAS LA BONNE FAÇON DE L’UTILISER ?

blocks.text: IT  HOLDS A  MEANING  BEYOND SIMPLE  DUPLICATION AND  FUSION .
blocks.translation: C’EST BIEN PLUS QUE SIMPLE DUPLICATION ET FUSION.

blocks.text: IS  TO  HARMONIZE LIFE  AND  SOUL ,  FATE AND  LIFE ,
blocks.translation: EST D’HARMONISER VIE ET ÂME, DESTIN ET VIE,

blocks.text: AND  MOLD  THEM INTO  A  TOTALITY ...  THAT IS  ITS  ESSENCE .
blocks.translation: ET DE LES FAÇONNER EN UNE TOTALITÉ... TEL EST SON ESSENCE.

blocks.text: KIM  JOONSOO HAS  LIVED  THROUGH HIS  CURRENT  AND PAST
blocks.translation: KIM JOONSOO A VÉCU SES VIES PASSÉES ET PRÉSENTES
ÉVOLUANT SON ÂME AU NIVEAU DE L’OMNIPOTENCE,

blocks.text: EVOLVING  HIS SOUL  TO  THE  LEVEL  OF THE  OMNIPOTENT ,
THE ABSOLUTE  PEAK  OF  A SUPERHUMAN !

blocks.translation: COMPRENDRE LA RAISON DE CES INNOMBRABLES RÉINCARNATIONS,

blocks.text: UNDERSTAND THE  REASON  BEHIND  ALL THOSE  COUNTLESS REINCARNATIONS ,
blocks.translation: N’EST-IL PAS JUSTE DE TE SOUHAITER LA BIENVENUE ?

blocks.text: ISN'T  IT  ONLY RIGHT  TO  WELCOME YOU ?

blocks.translation: CONNERIES... DES VIES PASSÉES QUE JE NE CONNAIS MÊME PAS,

blocks.text: BULLSHIT ... PAST  LIVES  I  DON'T EVEN
WHAT'S THE  POINT  OF  ALL THAT ... ?
WHATEVER I  WAS ,  NOW  THAT  I'VE LOST ,  THERE  IS  NO LONGER ...
blocks.translation: QUI QUE J’ÉTAIS, MAINTENANT QUE J’AI PERDU, IL N’Y A PLUS...
RIEN D’AUTRE... QUE FERMER LES YEUX...

blocks.text: I  THINK YOU  CAN  DO BETTER  THAN THAT .
blocks.translation: JE PENSAIS QUE TU POUVAIS FAIRE MIEUX.

blocks.text: IS  THAT THE  SUPERPOWER THE  WORLD  TREE GAVE  YOU ?
blocks.translation: EST-CE LE POUVOIR SUPRÊME QUE L’ARBRE MONDIAL T’A DONNÉ ?

blocks.text: RIGHT NOW  THAT  I  THINK ABOUT  IT ...
THERE WAS  A  TRAIT  I  HADN'T PROPERLY  MASTERED ЧЕТ .
blocks.translation: IL Y AVAIT UN TRAIT QUE JE N’AVAIS PAS VRAIMENT MAÎTRISÉ ЧЕТ.
TU AS UN TRAIT NON MAÎTRISÉ.

blocks.text: THE  METHOD  TO DRAW  OUT  THE  TRUE POWER  OF  THE [ WORLD ]  TRAIT ...
blocks.translation: LA MÉTHODE POUR EXTRAIRE LA VRAIE PUISSANCE DU TRAIT [MONDE]...

blocks.text: I  DIDN'T REALIZE  IT  BACK THEN ,  BUT ...
blocks.translation: JE NE L’AVAIS PAS RÉALISÉ À L’ÉPOQUE, MAIS...

blocks.text: SOMEHOW ,  I  THINK I  KNOW  NOW ...
blocks.translation: D'UNE CERTAINE FAÇON, JE PENSE LE SAVOIR MAINTENANT...

blocks.text: THE  POWER OF  THE  WORLD  TREE  IS THE  POWER  TO  WEAVE  THE MOST  FUNDAMENTAL THINGS  TOGETHER .
blocks.translation: LE POUVOIR DE L’ARBRE MONDIAL EST CELUI DE TISSER ENSEMBLE LES CHOSES LES PLUS FONDAMENTALES.

blocks.text: I  STILL DON'T  QUITE  GET IT ,  THOUGH ~
blocks.translation: JE NE COMPRENDS TOUJOURS PAS TOUT, CEPENDANT~

blocks.text: WELL ,  I  GUESS I'LL  FIGURE  IT  OUT AS  I  GO ~ !
blocks.translation: EH BIEN, JE VAIS LE DÉCOUVRIR SUR LE TAS~ !

blocks.text: THE  TIME  HAS COME  TO  MERGE  THEM ALL  TOGETHER .
blocks.translation: IL EST TEMPS DE FUSIONNER TOUTES CES CHOSES ENSEMBLE.

blocks.text: 원작  |  산호초 각색  | KY | 쟝 .  도라 출 작화  스튜디오  이너
blocks.translation: 원작 | 산호초 각색 | KY | 쟝 . 도라 출 작화 스튜디오 이너
